description.value:
Requirements You're in bipedal posture.

You squat down from bipedal posture to quadrupedal posture with enough force to send tremors through the ground around you. You @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.actions.Item.Change Posture] from bipedal posture to quadrupedal posture. Each creature within 10 feet of you must attempt a @Check[reflex|against:class-spell] saving throw against the higher of your class DC or spell DC.

Critical Success The creature is unaffected.

Success The creature is @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.Off-Guard] until the end of your turn.

Failure The creature falls @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.Prone].

Critical Failure The creature falls prone and takes @Damage[1d6[bludgeoning]] damage.
